content:
🌟 gutenberg | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a modern, block-based editor for WordPress that allows users to create rich and visually appealing content intuitively.
✨ Key Features: • Block-based content editing • Modular approach to pages and posts • Visually intuitive content arrangement • Creation of media-rich pages • Refinement of editing experience
📖 Summary: The Gutenberg project is the development hub for the block editor of WordPress, revolutionizing content creation with a modular, block-based approach. It enables users to visually arrange content elements like paragraphs and images, moving beyond traditional text editing to a more intuitive and flexible publishing experience.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
